checks.callIncludesInside: You should call your includes function inside isPangram.

checkLowerPangram.name: Check Lower Pangram
checkLowerPangram.description: Write an includes function and an isPangram function. The isPangram function should use includes to check whether a lowercase sentence contains every letter of the alphabet.

lowerPangramEmpty.name: Empty sentence
lowerPangramEmpty.description: An empty sentence is not a pangram.

lowerPangramFullAlphabet.name: Full lowercase alphabet
lowerPangramFullAlphabet.description: The complete lowercase alphabet is a pangram.

lowerPangramClassic.name: Classic pangram
lowerPangramClassic.description: The classic pangram sentence contains all 26 letters.

lowerPangramMissingX.name: Missing letter 'x'
lowerPangramMissingX.description: A sentence missing the letter 'x' is not a pangram.

lowerPangramMissingH.name: Missing letter 'h'
lowerPangramMissingH.description: A sentence missing the letter 'h' is not a pangram.

lowerPangramWithUnderscores.name: With underscores
lowerPangramWithUnderscores.description: A pangram with underscores instead of spaces.

lowerPangramNumbersReplacingLetters.name: Numbers replacing letters
lowerPangramNumbersReplacingLetters.description: A sentence where letters are replaced by numbers is not a pangram.

whereToStart.question: Where do I start?
whereToStart.answer: Write a small `includes(string, char)` helper first. It just asks 'does this character appear in this string?'. The main pangram check then becomes a few clean lines on top of it.

writeIncludesHelper.question: How do I write that includes() helper?
writeIncludesHelper.answer: Loop through each character of the string. If any of them equals the character you're looking for, return true. If the loop finishes without a match, return false.

checkEveryLetter.question: How do I check that every letter of the alphabet is there?
checkEveryLetter.answer: Loop through `"abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz"`, one letter at a time. For each, ask `includes(sentence, letter)`.

giveUpEarly.question: How do I know when to give up early?
giveUpEarly.answer: As soon as you find a letter that isn't in the sentence, return `false`. There's no point checking the rest. Only return `true` after every letter has been found.
